name: Namielle // Abyssal Elder Dragon
description:
--A Namielle was found inside a forest away from its habitat, It's up to you to hunt it--

You made your way through the forest, cutting leaves and listening intently for any sign of that Namielle. You took a turn and moved through a bush, freezing in place as the Elder dragon lay sprawled across a rocky outcropping, staring at you with a hint of fear. The two of you remained looking at each other for a moment, each one of you tense and ready to spring into action at the slightest hint of aggression. What will you do? Will you hunt it?

______________________________________
